message:
feat(forensic): add forensic export pipeline types and query engine

ForensicStore with bounded capacity, query engine supporting time range,
actor/action/verdict/sensitivity/correlation filtering, pagination, and
JSON/JSONL/CSV export. Redaction control for sensitivity levels.
25 unit tests covering all query filters, export formats, and telemetry.

Precursor for ft-3681t.6.4 forensics and compliance export pipeline.

Bead: ft-mkfvk

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
